name: two fantasy points from plays columns diverge in qtr filter
description: Regression for role-union (non-batchable) CTE-name collision: two instances of player_fantasy_points_from_plays differing in a per-column play filter (qtr) must emit distinct CTEs. Previously the get_cte_name hash only included aggregator-declared consumes_params (year/week/seas_type/scoring_format_id), so qtr did not differentiate the CTE name and the second column reused the first's CTE.
expected_query: with "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2024.nfl_team) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2024" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_2e54c33c59b7" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (4) union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (4) union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (4) union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (4)) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "role_union"."pid" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0), "rate_aggregate_8ee12cb70d41" as materialized (select "role_union"."pid" as "pid", SUM(role_union.pts) AS measure_total from (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.bc_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.psr_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.psr_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.trg_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') union all select nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid AS pid, "nfl_plays"."esbid", -1 AS pts from "nfl_plays" where nfl_plays.player_fuml_pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) as "role_union" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "role_union"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "role_union"."pid" having SUM(role_union.pts) > 0) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_2e54c33c59b7.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_8ee12cb70d41.measure_total) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS fantasy_points_from_plays_1, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" on "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_2e54c33c59b7" on "rate_aggregate_2e54c33c59b7"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_8ee12cb70d41" on "rate_aggregate_8ee12cb70d41"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.primary_position IN ('RB') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
